name: General Tso's Chicken #6
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
2 Dried red chiles - cut in half lengthwise
1 tbsp Chopped fresh orange peel OR 2 tsp Dried citrus peel (soaked & coarsely chopped)
1/2 tsp Roasted Sichuan peppercorns (finely ground), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT CHICKEN INTO THIN SLICES, 2 inches long, cutting against the grain.
2. PLACE chicken in a bowl with soy sauce, rice wine or sherry, ginger, cornstarch, and 1 teaspoon sesame oil. Mix well.
3. LET MARINADE for about 20 minutes.
4. HEAT oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
5. REMOVE CHICKEN FROM MARINADE using a slotted spoon.
6. ADD chicken to the pan and STIR-FRY for 2 minutes until it browns.
7. REMOVE chicken and LET IT DRAIN in a colander or sieve.
8. POUR OFF MOST OF THE OIL, leaving about 2 teaspoons.
9. REHEAT PAN OVER HIGH HEAT.
10. ADD dried chiles and STIR-FRY for 10 seconds.
11. RETURN CHICKEN TO THE PAN.
12. ADD REST OF INGREDIENTS AND STIR-FRY FOR 4 MINUTES, mixing well.
13. SERVE DISH IMMEDIATELY.
